name: Mixed Material Bath Tall Tower - Brightroom™
description:
Easily tidy up the look and feel of your bath space with this Mixed-Material Bath Tall Tower from Brightroom™. Made with a particle board frame and powder-coated steel legs, this bath tower makes a stunning addition to your bath space. This practical piece features multiple shelves with a single door for concealed storage and two open shelves below to hold decorative accents or often-used bath items.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
